lines.speaker: Veronica
lines.text: Can you please help me? I'm in a terrible spot of trouble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aha, sounds like a quest. I'll help.

lines.speaker: Veronica
lines.text: Yes yes, I suppose it is a quest. My fiance Ernest and I came upon this house.

lines.speaker: Veronica
lines.text: Seeing as we were a little lost Ernest decided to go in and ask for directions.

lines.speaker: Veronica
lines.text: That was an hour ago. That house looks spooky, can you go and see if you can find him for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Veronica
lines.text: Thank you, thank you. I'm very grateful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm looking for something to kill.

lines.speaker: Veronica
lines.text: Oh he went off to talk to some green warty guy. I'm sure he'll be back soon.
